prompt:
My horizontal layout breaks when users set accessibility text sizes. The HStack overflows and clips:

```swift
HStack {
    Image(systemName: "person.fill")
    Text(user.name).font(.headline)
    Spacer()
    Text(user.role).font(.subheadline)
}
```

assertions.rationale: Skill's layout adaptation pattern for accessibility sizes

assertions.text: Uses ViewThatFits or AnyLayout to switch HStack→VStack
assertions.rationale: Skill documents ViewThatFits (iOS 16+) as preferred approach

assertions.text: Wraps content in ScrollView for overflow at large sizes
assertions.rationale: Skill requires ScrollView for content that may overflow
